explanation: Reordered and normalized the path to a standard Windows format while preserving the original command structure and behavior.
Inserted quotes around the executable path to handle potential spaces in the path, a common safe mutation technique.
Reordered the arguments to test if the command accepts argument reordering without changing behavior.
Used uppercase hexadecimal notation for the first argument to test case insensitivity in argument parsing.
Lowercased the '-ForceV1' flag to test if the command accepts case-insensitive flag input.
